mainEntity.text: Process for Phoenix firms to audit current AI Overviews performance.

acceptedAnswer.text: 1) Search incognito legal queries; 2) Note citing firms; 3) Analyze their SEO; 4) Gap-fill with better content.

suggestedAnswer.text: Phoenix attorneys use this weekly; tools like SurferSEO help. Focus on bankruptcy gaps for quick wins against competitors.
